data.name: Sabrina

weaponImprint.name: Mezzaluna
weaponImprint.effect: During Stability Break, whenever stability is recovered, additionally restores 2 points of stability index. If stability index is above 10/10/10/10/8/6 points, increases damage dealt by 20%/25%/30%/35%/40%/40%. At the end of the action, applies [effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425]/[effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425]/[effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425]/[effect:c31427f8-0642-4467-a4c1-b646db070425]/[effect:cc52fd1d-819c-4973-a6c0-6208f659399a]/[effect:cc52fd1d-819c-4973-a6c0-6208f659399a] to the 1/1/1/1/1/2 enemy target(s) with the highest attack within 6/7/8/9/10/10 tiles for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to Varjagers is increased by 2.5%. If the skill used is a Confectance skill, the damage is further increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll passionate about culinary research and enjoying food, the kitchen is her new battlefield. Loves sharing her cooking process, though aroma may have boundaries, her smile spreads through the network, infecting every viewer.

skills.name: My Treat
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Flexible Modification
skills.description: Before an allied unit is attacked, if they are within 7 tiles of Sabrina, applies 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to the ally. This can be triggered up to 6 times per turn. Sabrina gains 1 point of Confectance Index for each instance of damage she deals. After using a skill to attack, she generates [effect:a7a2cc2b-3078-4d27-bafc-f20b389335c0] within the area. If Hydro tiles are already present in the area, a tile reaction is triggered, removing the tile and dealing fixed damage equal to 20% of attack to the enemy target on the tile.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increase the number of times [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] can be applied by 2.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: When Confectance is full, additionally consume 4 points of Confectance Index to increase skill damage by 30%.

skills.name: Delicious Feast
skills.description: Select 1 enemy target within 6 tiles to attack, dealing AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to then and all enemy targets within 2 tiles, applying [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] for 2 turns. Recovers 2 points of stability for each target hit. If only 1 target is hit, recovers 6 points of stability.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If only 1 target is hit, restores 6 points of stability index.

skills.name: Meal Preparation
skills.description: Deals AoE Hydro damage equal to 80% of attack to all enemy targets within 5 tiles and applies [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to up to 2 targets for 1 turn. Destroys any destructible Cover within range outside a 3x3 area around self.

skills.name: Gourmet Spirit
skills.description: Apply 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] to all allied targets, and gain [effect:8b9d0fae-d4df-40ab-8c51-73ffaabfc302] for 3 turns. Gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] once. While having [effect:8b9d0fae-d4df-40ab-8c51-73ffaabfc302] , if an enemy target within range deals targeted damage to an allied unit, use [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] against it, dealing physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 6 points of stability damage. This can be triggered up to 3 times per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases attack of [effect:8b9d0fae-d4df-40ab-8c51-73ffaabfc302] by 10%. Increase stability damage of [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] by 2 points.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: No longer consumes Confectance Index, gain [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] once.

keys.effect: When dealing targeted damage, applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] to the target for 1 turn.

Damage dealt by [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] is changed to Hydro damage. If this triggers any Hydro tile effect, it no longer removes the tile effect. Every time [effect:e6c91f66-b509-4f89-861e-29ca64014622] is performed, damage taken of Sabrina is reduced by 5%, stacking up to 30%, lasting for 2 turns.
When under attack, defense is increased by 20%.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 1 - Eating is a Blessing

keys.effect: Gains 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of the battle.
While on Hydro tiles, defense is increased by 30%, gaining immunity to displacement effects from enemy units and all abnormal Hydro terrain effects.
When Confectance Index is not full, recovers 2 points of stability index for each point of Confectance Index gained.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 4 - Eat Well, Sleep Well

keys.effect: The effective range of Delicious Feast changes to 1 tile, the skill targets tiles instead of units and pulls all enemies 1 tile toward the center. Damage dealt increases to 100% of attack.

The active skill Meal Preparation is modified to affect 5 tiles around self, and no longer applies [effect:4776f3a1-92cb-4e79-b018-35433bfdc6e2] . It now applies [effect:fadf4f3f-2810-49f0-b947-6d683741429d] to up to 2 targets for 1 turn. The cooldown is increased to 3 turns.

vertebrae.effect: Increase the number of times [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a] can be applied by 2.

imagoforms.effect: When attacked by enemy units with Hydro debuffs, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Hydro damage dealt is increased by 5%.
When not protected by cover, damage taken is reduce by 5%.
When stability is greater than 0, damage taken by allied units (not including this unit) is reduced by 2%. this effect can stack up to 3 times.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Attack increased by 15% of the unit's own defense. Expands the passive's effect to the entire map. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"d96d19fe-d1ae-4248-ad0a-4861c009b0dc","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

Increase attack equal to 25% of own defense. Increase the passive skill range to cover the entire map. This buff cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
